name: Tag Detection
system_prompt: You classify documents by assigning tags. Always use EXACT names from the available list. Never modify or abbreviate names.
user_template:
Available Tags:
{tags_list}

Document Content:
{content}

INSTRUCTIONS:
- Choose ONLY from the exact names provided above
- Assign all tags that apply; respond with 'None' if nothing fits
- Never assign tags from the blacklist

Respond ONLY with comma-separated tag names (no other text):
